meta.name: WHODAS 2.0 WHO Disability Assessment Schedule
meta.description: The WHODAS 2.0 is a 12-item self-report measure developed by the World Health Organization to assess health-related disability across six domains: Cognition, Mobility, Self-care, Getting along, Life activities, and Participation. It provides a standardized, cross-cultural assessment of functioning and disability regardless of medical diagnosis.
meta.author: World Health Organization (2010)
meta.reference: Ustun TB, Kostanjesek N, Chatterji S, Rehm J. Measuring health and disability: Manual for WHO Disability Assessment Schedule (WHODAS 2.0). World Health Organization. 2010.
meta.instruction: In the last 30 days, how much difficulty did you have in the following activities? Please select the most appropriate response for each item.

questions.text: Concentrating on doing something for ten minutes?
Standing for long periods such as 30 minutes?
Walking a long distance such as a kilometre?
Dealing with people you do not know?
How much of a problem did you have in doing your most important day-to-day activities well?
How much have you been emotionally affected by your health condition?
Joining in community activities in the same way as anyone else can?

ranges.label: No Disability
ranges.description: Your total score indicates no significant disability. You are functioning well across the assessed domains.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your current level of functioning
Engage in health-promoting activities to preserve your well-being
Monitor any changes in your functioning over time

ranges.label: Mild Disability
ranges.description: Your total score indicates mild disability. Some areas of daily functioning may be affected to a limited degree.
suggestions: Identify the domains where you experience the most difficulty
Consider adaptive strategies or tools to support daily activities
Discuss any concerns with your healthcare provider
Maintain physical activity appropriate to your abilities

ranges.label: Moderate Disability
ranges.description: Your total score indicates moderate disability. Several areas of daily functioning are notably affected.
suggestions: Consult with healthcare professionals about rehabilitation options
Explore assistive devices or environmental modifications
Seek support services for areas of greatest difficulty
Review your subscale scores to prioritize intervention areas

ranges.label: Severe Disability
ranges.description: Your total score indicates severe disability. Many areas of daily functioning are significantly impaired and require professional support.
suggestions: Seek comprehensive assessment from a multidisciplinary team
Explore available disability support services and programs
Discuss treatment and rehabilitation options with your healthcare provider
Consider applying for relevant support and assistance programs

cognition.label: Mild
cognition.description: Mild difficulty with concentration and memory.

cognition.label: Moderate
cognition.description: Moderate cognitive difficulties affecting daily tasks.

cognition.label: Severe
cognition.description: Severe cognitive difficulties significantly impairing daily functioning.

mobility.label: Mild
mobility.description: Mild difficulty with standing and walking.

mobility.label: Moderate
mobility.description: Moderate mobility limitations affecting daily activities.

mobility.label: Severe
mobility.description: Severe mobility difficulties significantly limiting movement.

self_care.label: Mild
self_care.description: Mild difficulty with washing and dressing.

self_care.label: Moderate
self_care.description: Moderate self-care difficulties requiring some assistance.

self_care.label: Severe
self_care.description: Severe self-care difficulties requiring substantial assistance.

getting_along.label: None
getting_along.description: No significant difficulty getting along with others.

getting_along.label: Mild
getting_along.description: Mild difficulty in social interactions and relationships.

getting_along.label: Moderate
getting_along.description: Moderate difficulty maintaining relationships and interacting with others.

getting_along.label: Severe
getting_along.description: Severe difficulty in social interactions significantly impairing relationships.

life_activities.label: None
life_activities.description: No significant difficulty with life activities.

life_activities.label: Mild
life_activities.description: Mild difficulty with day-to-day work and important activities.

life_activities.label: Moderate
life_activities.description: Moderate difficulty performing work and daily activities effectively.

life_activities.label: Severe
life_activities.description: Severe difficulty with daily activities and work, requiring significant support.

participation.label: Mild
participation.description: Mild emotional impact and limited difficulty participating in community activities.

participation.label: Moderate
participation.description: Moderate emotional impact and participation restrictions.

participation.label: Severe
participation.description: Severe emotional impact and major participation restrictions in community life.
